opportunities.title: [Hiring] Contract sales closer — AI infra startup, remote, $4k/mo base + commission
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Contract sales closer — AI infra startup, remote, $4k/mo base + commission

Technical founder building an AI infrastructure startup. Hiring my first salesperson. The deal: contract, $4k/mo base + uncapped commission per closed deal (commission is the main upside, no equity). Short paid trial to start. I generate the pipeline — you handle warm replies and co-close calls with me. I cover the technical side. Looking for: sold technical products to technical buyers (CTOs, Heads of Eng/AI, devs), actually closed deals, 3-7 yrs experience, remote US/EU-overlapping hours. Apply: https://form
